generated_oml:
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M) for the motor of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder providing position, velocity, and acceleration data for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position sensor mounted on the drive train providing position, velocity, and acceleration data for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) data from motor current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Simulation_Enabler, MQTT_DataStreaming_Enabler
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data measured by motor and secondary encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted, SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Simulation_Enabler, MQTT_DataStreaming_Enabler
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity data measured by motor and secondary encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted, SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Simulation_Enabler, MQTT_DataStreaming_Enabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration data measured by motor and secondary encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted, SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Simulation_Enabler, MQTT_DataStreaming_Enabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data derived from current and other parameters for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentData, PositionData, VelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Simulation_Enabler, MQTT_DataStreaming_Enabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data derived from position and velocity measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Simulation_Enabler, MQTT_DataStreaming_Enabler
]

instance SysML_BDD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram model for structural description of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML_Modeling_Enabler
]

instance SysML_IBD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram model for structural description of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML_Modeling_Enabler
]

instance Simulink_Motor_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for the motor component of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Simulation_Enabler
]

instance Simulink_Gearwheel_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for the gearwheel component of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Simulation_Enabler
]

instance Simulink_CycloidalGearbox_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for the cycloidal gearbox component of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Simulation_Enabler
]

instance CoulombViscous_FrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Simulation_Enabler
]

instance Stribeck_FrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Stribeck friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Simulation_Enabler
]

instance Dahl_FrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Dahl friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Simulation_Enabler
]

instance LuGre_FrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box LuGre friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Simulation_Enabler
]

instance SysML_Modeling_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for structural description of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentification_Service
]

instance Simulink_Simulation_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation of robot components and friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentification_Service, DashboardVisualization_Service
]

instance AAS_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for managing digital twin assets and metadata"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentification_Service, DashboardVisualization_Service
]

instance MQTT_DataStreaming_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentification_Service, DashboardVisualization_Service
]

instance Siemens_SINUMERIK840Dsl_Controller_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for interfacing with physical robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentification_Service, DashboardVisualization_Service
]

instance Dashboard_Visualization_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time monitoring of robot performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualization_Service
]

instance FrictionIdentification_Service : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelIdentification_Insight
]

instance DashboardVisualization_Service : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of robot performance data via dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancement_Service : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhancement of robot motion accuracy through refined friction model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControlRefinement_Action
]

instance FrictionModelIdentification_Insight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model identification insights used to enhance robot motion control accuracy through refined model parameters"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot performance metrics for monitoring and analysis"
]

instance MotionControlRefinement_Action : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Refinement of robot motion control parameters based on friction model insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABIMAX100RobotFirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot consisting of motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox"
    base:contains MotorComponent, GearwheelComponent, CycloidalGearboxComponent
]

instance MotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor component of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearwheelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction, as the digital shadow is a passive entity with one-way data flow and does not push data back to the physical system."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of engineering models (SysML), simulation models (Simulink), processing components for friction model identification, and unified dashboard visualization, forming a passive digital shadow for real-time data analysis and friction model refinement."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, utilizing live operational data for real-time friction analysis during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated data versus measured data to validate friction models and identify deviations for motion accuracy improvement."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards and SysML modeling language for structural and behavioral modeling."
]
